_comment: v1 = top monsoon fevers in India. 'family' selects the weather-shaping model in src/build_weather.py: mosquito (unimodal temperature near temp_optimal_c, times lagged rainfall for standing water, times humidity), waterborne (recent + lagged rainfall as a contamination proxy), febrile (humidity + day-to-day temperature variability). seasonal_push is a coarse monsoon-amplitude prior used only by the MOCK trends/positivity providers until the real feeds land. flagship drives the seasonal hero rotation.
